name: Joséphine
dev_strap: Terraced hillside residences above the Ionian
sub: A second-floor one-bedroom apartment of over 123 square metres gross with a private patio.
description: A second-floor one-bedroom apartment of over 123 square metres gross with a private patio — unusually generous for its type at Green Coast, Palasë. The patio extends the living space outdoors for the long Riviera season, with the resort's plaza and Blue Flag beach moments away.
highlights: Quiet north-western corner, top of the quarter
Pools & Blue Flag beach below the resort
location_body: Green Coast is the Albanian Riviera's most established resort address — a stone-built village above the Blue Flag beach at Palasë, where the Ceraunian mountains meet the Ionian. Mediterranean architecture in local stone, travertine and timber; promenades, pools, restaurants and a beach club below; the life of the coast a few steps from the door.
position_copy: Joséphine holds the quiet north-western corner of the village, at the top of the quarter with greenery at its back. The hotel is a short walk east, the central plaza below it, and the paths down to the beach begin at the village edge.
